title: acacia verticillata subsp. verticillata
intro: Acacia verticillata subsp. verticillata, also known as the rusty broom or rusty wattle, is a subspecies of shrub or small tree native to eastern Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Acacia verticillata subsp. verticillata are numerous, including its potential to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Acacia verticillata subsp. verticillata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
